steps.title: Identify the temporal frame
steps.content: ”In a 2022 study” places the researchers' action at a specific moment in the past when the study occurred.

steps.title: Choose the completed past action
steps.content: Simple past “looked” expresses the finished action within the study. The other forms mischaracterize the action: “looking” doesn't work structurally, “were looking” suggests an ongoing action, and “had looked” implies a prior past event that isn't established. That matches choice A — A is correct.
